posts.author: MadhuGorthi
posts.community: ICICI Lombard - Quality franchise in under penetrated industry
posts.text: Post Q1 FY27, ICICI Lombard has corrected by over 10%, bringing the P/B multiple to around 4.7x, which appears to be near the lower end of its historical range. Current valuation may offer a margin of safety for fresh entries. Potential trigger for re-rating could be the announcement of increase in third-party motor insurance tariff, which, if favorable, may help improve sentiment.
